channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
item.description: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, May 23 (game #1580)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, May 23 (game #811)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, May 23 (game #1077)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: SpaceX launches Starship V3 for the first time, but loses booster on return
item.description: The company had a mostly successful first launch of its upgraded Starship V3, which it needs to power its many ambitious goals in the years to come.

item.title: Valid certificates, stolen accounts: how attackers broke npm's last trust signal
item.description: On May 19, 633 malicious npm package versions passed Sigstore provenance verification. They were cleared by the system because the attacker had generated valid signing certificates from a compromised maintainer account.Sigstore worked exactly as designed: it verified the package was built in a CI environment, confirmed a valid certificate was issued, and recorded everything in the transparency log. What it cannot do is determine whether the person holding the credentials authorized the publish — and that gap turned the last automated trust signal in npm into camouflage.One day earlier, StepSec...

item.title: I've found 12 top-rated soundbars and speakers from Sonos to upgrade your home audio — get up to $200 off
item.description: I've found 12 awesome deals on several of our top-rated Sonos speakers and soundbars in this year's Memorial Day sales.

item.title: AI chatbots got election information wrong 90% of the time in a new study — including ChatGPT rivals
item.description: New studies suggest popular AI chatbots continue making significant mistakes around election information, creating growing concerns as more people rely on AI tools instead of traditional search and news sources

item.title: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed review: Apple TV's new thriller features Tatiana Maslany's best role since Orphan Black
item.description: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed is another win for Apple TV, joining many other must-watch shows on the streaming service in May.

item.title: Stay productive all summer long and beyond with this $30 Microsoft Office license
item.description: Lock in major savings on a lifetime license for Microsoft Office Professional 2021 for Windows.

item.title: Are AdultFriendFinder’s messaging tools actually safe for swapping nudes?
item.description: We took an honest look at AdultFriendFinder's pros and cons as a platform for exchanging nudes from a privacy perspective. Here's what you need to know:

item.title: How to watch Mexico vs. Ghana online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream Mexico vs. Ghana in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: 5 hookup apps and sites deemed legit by users
item.description: Here are five hookup sites and apps that are extremely popular among their own users, and what makes them so special.

item.title: Blue Origin cleared to fly New Glenn mega-rocket after April mishap
item.description: Jeff Bezos' rocket company confirmed an engine failure led to the loss of an AST SpaceMobile satellite last month, but offered little detail.

item.title: The ‘Steroid Olympics’ are happening this weekend, and even former Olympians are taking part
item.description: A spectacle fit for Sin City, the Enhanced Games hosts elite athletes juiced up by performance-enhancing drugs. Top athletes from around the world, including Olympic medal winners, are gathering this Memorial Day weekend for a new Donald Trump Jr.-backed sports competition—and drugs are not only allowed but encouraged.
